title: Curbside Green Bin Pickup
summary: Toronto collects organic waste curbside every week using the Green Bin program, available to all single-family homes and most multi-unit buildings.
details: Accepted: fruit and vegetable scraps, coffee grounds, meat, dairy, soiled paper
Collection is weekly year-round, on your regular garbage day
Green Bins are free from city distribution events or by calling 311

sources.title: City of Toronto — Green Bin Overview

title: Bike Share Toronto — Annual Membership
summary: City-run bike share with 7,000+ bikes across 700 stations. Annual membership covers unlimited 30-minute rides.
details: Stations concentrated downtown, expanding into Scarborough and Etobicoke
Annual pass is $99, single rides $3.25 for 30 minutes
E-bikes available at select stations for an extra per-minute fee
